subject: Fwd: S76 update
body:
Should I release the funds to Sikorsky or is there something else you want  
me to accomplish first?  Please advise.
 
Sincerely,

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison  Avenue
Fourth Floor
New York, New York 10022
Telephone:  212-750-1176
Telecopier: 212-750-0381
Mobile: 862-485-6315
e-mail:  dkiesq@aol.com

**************Start the year off right.  Easy ways to stay in shape.     
http://body.aol.com/fitness/winter-exercise?NCID=aolcmp00300000002489


From: LVJET@aol.com
Subject: S76 update
Date: Tue, 08 Jan 2008 23:04:59 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc: rkahn@nysgmail.com

Darren,
the work is complete,,,I am very satisfied with all word  accomplished. 
-lowered the aft facing seat, does not obstruct view out fwd  windows.
-glued seat cushion leather to foam on seat bottom so it does not  vibrate.
-reworked VIP arm rest stitching and installed button snaps  to prevent cover 
from vibrating,
-cabin Ipod and cell phone volume is great. they installed  amplifier. 
-secured carpet runner with snaps to hold in place.
-painted black non-skid on entrance  step for proper  appearance.
-installed amp for Ipod in cockpit to increase  volumne.
I plan on departing Tomorrow for Palm Beach in S76.
-all pink sheet items are completed to my satisfaction. 
Money transfer to Sikorsky is OK in my opinion. 
Thanks,
Larry V
 



**************Start the year off right.  Easy ways to stay in shape.     
http://body.aol.com/fitness/winter-exercise?NCID=aolcmp00300000002489
